subcodes.first_line: Praise beseemeth and befitteth the Best-Beloved Who hath caused the lights of the Most Great Name to shine forth from the horizon of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوبی را لایق و سزاست که انوار اسم اعظم را از افق عالم ظاهر فرمود
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
